notes: articulo = graded answer (el/la/ambos); genero = indicator (m/f/ambos); definicion = English gloss shown only AFTER answering. Removable iff articulo in {el,la} AND contexto=='' AND tags==[]. Homograph & bebé pairs intentionally share a normalized palabra. dificultad: curated outliers seeded 'dificil'; fluff and regla-ok anchors 'facil'.

words.definicion: gorilla (animal, el; ambos in other senses)
art (el arte sing., las artes pl.)
internet (el común; la internet = the web)
frying pan (Spain: la; Lat. Am.: el)
accent mark (Spain: la; Southern Cone: el)
question / query (Spain: el; Lat. Am.: la)
baby (Lat. Am.: la/el by the baby's sex)
